newest.title: Code based implementation of an oData V4-Service throws not implemented when using $groupby
newest.description: Ich created an oData V4 Service last week and implemented the code based approach to create the service. I am using the latest version of the SAP Cloud SDK and the latest version of the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model. I have implemented the service and it works fine when I use it with basic queries. However, when I try to use $groupby in my query, I get a not implemented error. I have checked the documentation and it seems that $groupby is supported in the latest version of the SAP Cloud SDK. I have also checked the implementation of the service and it seems that $groupby is not implemented in the code based approach. Is there a way to implement $groupby in the code based approach or is it only supported in the annotation based approach?
